basic_details.job_title: DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DEO, Project Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Mineral Foundation Trust Ramgarh (DMF Ramgarh)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Project Officer, Project Officer, Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Mineral Foundation Trust Ramgarh (DMF Ramgarh) has released the official Senior Project Officer, Project Officer, Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 on 13 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as Master's Degree, MBA, PGDM, B.Tech, B.E, MCA, or Graduate, and meeting the age criteria as per government norms, can apply via Email from 13 May 2026 to 20 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be as per government norms. Specific age limits are not detailed in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree, MBA, PGDM, B.Tech, B.E, MCA, Graduate
qualification.details: Senior Project Officer – Health & Nutrition: Master's Degree or equivalent (PGDM)/MBA in health, Development Studies, or related fields from a reputed national or international university/institution. Minimum 7 years of work experience in the health sector. Preference for candidates with experience in Government/International Organizations. Out of the total experience, 3 years should be in DMF-PMU. Senior Project Officer – Livelihood and Skill Development: Master's Degree or equivalent (PGDM) in Management, Agriculture, Social Sciences, or Development Studies from a recognized university/institution. Minimum 7 years of relevant experience in implementation, management, monitoring and evaluation of social development/livelihood/agriculture programmes, along with database management, data analysis, documentation, and MIS in large-scale government/public sector projects. Out of the total experience, 3 years should be in DMFT-PMU. Project Officer – Finance: Master's Degree in Management, Finance, Commerce, Accounting, or related fields. Minimum 5 years of experience in accounting, auditing, and financial management in Government/Development Sector/NGOs. Familiarity with Government of Jharkhand accounting standards and procedures. Proficiency in Tally or similar accounting software. Out of the total experience, 3 years should be in DMFT-PMU. Project Officer – IT & Data Analytics: MCA or B.Tech in IT/Computer Science from a reputed institution. Minimum 5 years of experience in working on dashboards, MIS, and IT systems. Good knowledge of MIS and working on AI applications. Project Officer – Engineer: B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering/Electrical Engineering from a recognized university/institution. Minimum 5 years of experience in design, estimation, execution, and supervision of civil engineering projects. Expertise in CAD software (AutoCAD, Revit, ArchiCAD). Strong knowledge of 2D and 3D design principles. Knowledge of mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) integration. Skills in 3D rendering software (SketchUp, Rhino, Lumion, V-Ray). Ensuring compliance with zoning laws, environmental regulations, and safety codes. Data Entry Operator: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university/institution. Minimum 2 years of experience as a Data Entry Operator or MIS support staff. High accuracy and speed in data entry and typing (Hindi and English). Proficiency in MS office and basic MIS system.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Project Officer – Livelihood and Skill Development

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMF Ramgarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 is 20th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies available in the DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 for various posts including Senior Project Officer, Project Officer, and Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 is through email. Candidates need to send their applications along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from a Graduate degree to Master's Degree, MBA, PGDM, B.Tech, B.E, and MCA. Specific details for each post are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for DMF Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 will involve an Online Interview followed by an In-Person Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the positions advertised by DMF Ramgarh?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions advertised by DMF Ramgarh is Contractual. This means the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the DMF Ramgarh located?
faq.answer: The District Mineral Foundation Trust Ramgarh (DMF Ramgarh) is located in Ramgarh, Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for the Senior Project Officer posts?
faq.answer: For the Senior Project Officer posts, a minimum of 7 years of work experience is required. For specific roles like Health & Nutrition, experience in the health sector is preferred, and for Livelihood & Skill Development, experience in social development programs is essential.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Jharkhand apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any domicile restrictions. However, it is advisable for candidates to check the official notification for any state-specific eligibility criteria.
